scripts.start:prod:all: NODE_ENV=production concurrently -n server,fe -c "yellow.bold","green.bold" "pnpm --dir server start" "pnpm --dir fe preview"
scripts.build: turbo run build --filter=@wb/user-magagement-center-server && MODE=development turbo run build --filter=@wb/user-magagement-center-fe && node scripts/pack-for-deploy.cjs mode=development
scripts.build:dev:server: turbo run build --filter=@wb/user-magagement-center-server && node scripts/pack-for-deploy.cjs mode=development
scripts.build:test: turbo run build --filter=@wb/user-magagement-center-server && MODE=test turbo run build --filter=@wb/user-magagement-center-fe && node scripts/pack-for-deploy.cjs mode=test
scripts.build:test:server: turbo run build --filter=@wb/user-magagement-center-server && node scripts/pack-for-deploy.cjs mode=test
scripts.build:prod: turbo run build --filter=@wb/user-magagement-center-server && MODE=production turbo run build --filter=@wb/user-magagement-center-fe && node scripts/pack-for-deploy.cjs mode=production
scripts.build:prod:server: turbo run build --filter=@wb/user-magagement-center-server && node scripts/pack-for-deploy.cjs mode=production
